metadata.title: About – Formwise
metadata.description: Discover Formwise, the platform for smart, simple and effective school management.

AboutPage.title: About Formwise
AboutPage.intro: Formwise is a SaaS platform dedicated to the modern management of schools: enrolments, payments, documents, notifications and much more, all in one.
AboutPage.missionBody: We built Formwise to help schools, nurseries and educational organisations move beyond Excel sheets, WhatsApp groups and a patchwork of disconnected tools. Our mission is to make school management smoother, more professional and, above all, more human.
AboutPage.techBody: Formwise is built with the best web technologies: Next.js, Supabase, Stripe and shadcn/ui. The application is hosted in Europe (OVH/Supabase) and strictly complies with GDPR to safeguard data privacy and security.
AboutPage.fieldBody: We work directly with head teachers, teachers and parents to build a useful, intuitive solution that fits the realities of every institution. Every feature comes from a real-world need.
AboutPage.frenchBody: Formwise is a 100% French solution, developed in Marseille by 1367 Studio. It aims to provide a local, reliable alternative to American or otherwise unsuitable tools for the French-speaking education system.
AboutPage.securityBody: All data is encrypted, regularly backed up, and access is secured with strong authentication. Our servers are based in Europe and align with CNIL recommendations.
AboutPage.contactNote: For any question, partnership or user feedback, write to us at: <link>formwisecontact@gmail.com</link>

metadata.title: Terms of Use – Formwise
metadata.description: Read the Formwise platform Terms of Use, including user obligations, restrictions and responsibilities.

Cgu.title: Terms of Use
Cgu.section1Body: These Terms of Use govern the conditions for accessing and using the services offered by Formwise (hereinafter "the Platform"), published by 1367 Studio, registered office at 11 Rue Étienne Henry Gouin, 13011 Marseille, registered under number 912 767 845 00015.
Cgu.section2Body: Use of the Platform implies full acceptance of these Terms by the user. If the user disagrees with all or part of the Terms, they must immediately stop using the services.
Cgu.section3Body: Access to the Platform is reserved to users with a personal account, created via the registration form. The user agrees to provide accurate information when creating their account and to keep it up to date. Access may be temporarily suspended for technical reasons (maintenance, updates, security…).
Cgu.section4Item1: use the Platform in a legal, fair and non-fraudulent manner;
Cgu.section4Item2: not attempt to access unauthorised data or features;
Cgu.section4Item3: not disrupt or interrupt the proper operation of the services;
Cgu.section4Item4: respect the rights of other users and applicable laws.
Cgu.section4Outro: Any breach may result in the immediate suspension or deletion of the account, without notice or compensation.
Cgu.section5Body: All content on the Platform (text, logos, graphics, videos, software, etc.) is the exclusive property of Formwise or subject to a right of use. Any reproduction, representation, distribution or exploitation, in whole or in part, without prior authorisation is strictly prohibited.
Cgu.section6Body: Data collected via the Platform is processed in accordance with our Privacy Policy. Under the GDPR, the user has a right of access, rectification, objection and deletion of their data by contacting: formwisecontact@gmail.com.
Cgu.section7Body: The Platform is provided "as is". Formwise cannot be held liable for direct or indirect damages resulting from the use or impossibility of using the services.
Cgu.section8Body: The user may delete their account at any time. The publisher reserves the right to suspend or terminate any account in case of non-compliance with these Terms, without notice.
Cgu.section9Body: Formwise reserves the right to amend these Terms at any time. The user will be informed of any update via the Platform. Continued use after modification implies acceptance.
Cgu.section10Body1: These Terms are governed by French law. In case of dispute, exclusive jurisdiction is granted to the courts of Marseille, unless otherwise required by law.
Cgu.section10Body2: The Platform's liability shall in no case exceed an amount equivalent to two (2) months of fees actually paid by the user for the use of the services during the twelve (12) months preceding the event giving rise to the dispute.

metadata.title: Terms of Service – Formwise
metadata.description: Review the conditions of use, termination and availability for the Formwise service.

Cgs.title: Terms of Service
Cgs.intro: These Terms of Service govern the use of the Formwise platform and the services offered by the publisher to its professional customers.
Cgs.section1Body: The contract is concluded for an indefinite duration, with automatic monthly or quarterly renewal depending on the chosen plan. Each started period is owed in full.
Cgs.section2Body: The customer may terminate the contract at any time, with one (1) month's notice prior to the renewal date. Termination does not entitle the customer to a pro-rata refund unless otherwise stated in the contract.
Cgs.section3Body: The publisher commits to an average monthly availability of 95%, excluding planned maintenance or force majeure. In case of significant breach, a commercial credit may be considered as a goodwill gesture, without constituting an admission of liability.
Cgs.section4Body: The publisher's liability is capped, all causes combined, at an amount equivalent to the sums paid by the customer in the last twelve (12) months. No compensation will be due for indirect damages, loss of data or loss of revenue.
Cgs.section5Body: The customer is granted only a personal, non-exclusive and non-transferable right to use the services. No intellectual property right is transferred. Any reproduction or reverse engineering attempt is strictly forbidden.
Cgs.section6Body: The customer may request the export of their data at the end of the contract. This operation may be subject to specific billing depending on its complexity. Data is returned in a standard format (CSV, JSON, etc.).
Cgs.section7Body: This contract is governed by French law. In case of dispute, the competent courts shall be those of the jurisdiction of Marseille.

metadata.title: Privacy Policy – Formwise
metadata.description: Find out how Formwise protects your data in accordance with the GDPR and applicable French law.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.intro: This privacy policy describes how the Formwise platform collects, uses, stores and protects the personal data of its users, in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and applicable French law.
Privacy.section1Body: The data controller is Formwise, located at 11 Rue Étienne Henry Gouin 13011 Marseille, reachable at: formwisecontact@gmail.com.
Privacy.section2Intro: We collect only the data strictly necessary to provide our services:
Privacy.section4Body: Data is hosted in France or in countries recognised as adequate by the European Commission. All data is secured by encryption, access control and regular backups.
Privacy.section5Body: Data is retained for the duration of the contractual relationship, then archived in pseudonymised form (without first or last name) for a maximum of 3 years for evidentiary or legal compliance purposes, before final deletion.
Privacy.section6Intro: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights:
Privacy.section6Item1: Right of access to your data
Privacy.section6Outro: You may exercise your rights by contacting us at: formwisecontact@gmail.com. We commit to replying within 30 days.
Privacy.section7Body: Technical and organisational measures are in place to protect your data, in particular encryption, two-factor authentication, regular backups and strict access control.
Privacy.section8Outro: Each of these services complies with the requirements of the GDPR.
Privacy.section9Body: Disaster Recovery Plan (DRP) and Business Continuity Plan (BCP) measures are in place to ensure the availability and integrity of the service.
Privacy.section10Body: We reserve the right to modify this policy at any time. In case of substantial change, you will be notified by email or upon your next connection to the platform.
Privacy.section11Body: This policy is governed by French law. In case of dispute, the courts of Marseille shall have sole jurisdiction.
